---
title: "Calendar"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: assets/calendar/calendar-head.html
---

Our shared public calendar has dates for upcoming events in the lab.
It contains public events that are of interest to the team and students.

<div id="ec"></div>

<br>

## ISE calendar data flow

The ISE calendar combines manually maintained events with automated imports from TimeEdit and AISNET. The resulting canonical calendar data feeds both the public ISE calendar page and an ICS feed that can be subscribed to from external calendar applications.

::: {.text-center}
```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    manual[Manual additions]
    timeedit[TimeEdit sync]
    ais[AIS sync]

    events[(data/events.yaml)]

    calendar[ISE calendar page]
    ics[ICS feed for sync]

    manual --> events
    timeedit --> events
    ais --> events

    events --> calendar
    events --> ics

    click manual "#manual-additions" "Read about manual calendar additions"
    click timeedit "#timeedit-sync" "Read about the TimeEdit sync"
    click ais "#ais-sync" "Read about the AIS sync"
    click events "https://github.com/fs-ise/handbook/blob/main/data/events.yaml" "View canonical calendar data"
    click calendar "#ise-calendar-data-flow" "Read about the calendar page"
    click ics "#ics-feed-calendar-sync-output" "Read about the ICS feed"
```
:::

All input modes are normalized into the shared [`data/events.yaml`](data/events.yaml) file before the calendar page and ICS feed are generated.

### Manual additions

Manual additions are maintained directly in [`data/events.yaml`](data/events.yaml). Use this mode for events that are not available from an automated source.

### TimeEdit sync

The TimeEdit sync imports teaching and timetable-related events with [`src/sync_timeedit.py`](src/sync_timeedit.py). It runs through the [TimeEdit calendar sync GitHub Action](.github/workflows/sync_timeedit_calendar.yml).

### AIS sync

The AIS sync imports selected institutional and conference events with [`src/sync_aisnet.py`](src/sync_aisnet.py). It runs through the [AISNET sync GitHub Action](.github/workflows/sync_aisnet.yml).

## ICS feed / calendar sync output

The ICS feed is generated from the same canonical data as the calendar page by [`src/update_calendar.py`](src/update_calendar.py), with regular updates handled by the [calendar ICS GitHub Action](.github/workflows/update_calendar_ics.yml). Subscribe to the ISE calendar ICS feed from external calendar apps instead of manually copying events.

```sh
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fs-ise/handbook/main/assets/calendar/fs-ise.ical
```

<script src="assets/calendar/calendar.js"></script>
